Research and Projects

Neural Machine Translation Repo

Worked under the guidance of Dr. Thomas Laurent of Loyola Marymount University’s Mathematics Department to enhance the PyTorch tutorial “NLP From Scratch: Translation with a sequence to sequence network and attention”. Culminated in a research paper which can be found here and a technical blog which can be found here.

This work was presented first to LMU faculty and staff and later at Optum’s MinneAnalytics conference.

Rental Rundown Website

Building a website to create customizable rental property analysis reports. The website is still in working progress and is only being hosted on a development level server, so it may take ~15-20 seconds for the page to initially render.

Analysis of Atmoshperic Gas Concentration Samples Repo

Assisted Dr. Lambert Doezema of Loyola Marymount University’s Chemistry Department with data analysis. Specifically, used python to plot, map, and analyze various atmospheric gas concentrations collected over a ten year period by NASA’s Student Airborne Research Program.

This work was presented at the 2017 Southern California Conferences for Undergraduate Research.

qlanners.github.io is maintained by qlanners
